rule: paper_text = (title + ' ' + snippet).lower(); per content_word substring match; overlap_count>=2 forces hit; else agent judgment (skeptical) on functional prior-art equivalence

results.title: Contributions From Aboriginal Australian Psychology: Songlines, Memory, and Relational Knowledge Systems

results.title: Lightweight LLM Agent Memory with Small Language Models
results.reason: No overlap; lightweight memory unrelated to path-indexed structure.

results.title: Memex(RL): Scaling Long-Horizon LLM Agents via Indexed Experience Memory
results.reason: Skeptical: 'Indexed Experience Memory' uses stable indices on artifacts, NOT path-sequence keys with branch-conditional successors. Functionally distinct from the songlines/path-indexed claim. Miss.

results.title: MemMachine: A Ground-Truth-Preserving Memory System for Personalized AI Agents
results.reason: Sentence-level indexing of raw episodes; not path-conditioned. Miss.

results.title: MemORAI: Memory Organization and Retrieval via Adaptive Graph Intelligence
results.reason: PageRank on a graph; no path-key retrieval. Miss.

results.title: Rethinking Memory Mechanisms of Foundation Agents
results.reason: Generic survey. Miss.

results.title: A-Mem: Agentic Memory for LLM Agents (Zettelkasten method)
results.reason: Skeptical: Zettelkasten links via shared attributes/embeddings, NOT path-indexed sequence keys with branch-conditional reinterpretation. Adjacent but not equivalent prior art. Miss.

results.title: Collaborative Memory: Multi-User Memory Sharing in LLM Agents
results.reason: User-level access control, not shared-node path-conditioning. Miss.

results.title: Memory in Large Language Models: Mechanisms, Evaluation and Evolution
results.reason: Survey. Miss.

results.reason: Causal/semantic graph, not path-indexed. Miss.

results.reason: Forced: 2 matches. The substantive LLM prior art the novelty claim explicitly distinguishes itself from.

results.title: Spatial Metaphors for LLM Memory (PDF)
results.reason: Snippet contains 'method of loci' (match) but 'memory palace' phrase is absent (text says 'spatial memory metaphor'). Not forced by 2-overlap rule, but agent judgment HIT because this is the PDF of the same MemPalace critical-analysis paper that is the substantive LLM prior art.

disagreement_details.note: Primary judged Memex(RL) Indexed Experience Memory as adjacent/hit. Skeptical re-judgment: indices on artifacts != path-sequence keys with branch-conditional successors. Functionally distinct.

Primary judged A-Mem/Zettelkasten as adjacent shared-node hit. Skeptical re-judgment: Zettelkasten links via shared attributes/embeddings, not path-indexed sequence-conditional successors. Not equivalent prior art.

Primary HIT via 'same prior art' judgment. Skeptical: zero mechanical matches ('mempalace' has no space so does not match 'memory palace'); derivative analysis page adds no independent prior art beyond the canonical paper itself.
Primary HIT via derivative-of-MemPalace judgment. Skeptical: zero mechanical matches, popular write-up, not independent prior art.
